context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual indicator of Echo singing, accompanies singing animation
context.screen_position: Spawns above-right of Echo at (75, 50), floats upward
context.usage_scenario: Spawns during singing animation (happiness >= 90, relationship level 4). Musical notes float upward while Echo sings. Max 3 notes visible at once.

animation.description: Spawns above-right of Echo, floats upward at 8px/second, fades after 1.5 seconds. Spawns continuously during singing (every 0.5s).

visual_specification.details: Note shape: 3x5px yellow (#FFEC27) eighth note (♪). Spawn position: above-right of Echo at (75, 50). Movement: floats upward at 8px/second. Lifespan: 1.5 seconds. Fade: last 0.5 seconds. Spawn rate: every 0.5 seconds during singing. Max 3 notes visible simultaneously.

relationships.differences_from: heart_particle: note vs heart, singing vs petting, yellow vs pink. zzz_particle: note vs ZZZ, awake vs sleeping.

explicit_negations: Notes do not bounce or dance
Notes do not grow or shrink
No multiple note types (only eighth note)
